title: tephrosia holstii
intro: Tephrosia holstii, also known as the 'Pride of India', is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and is commonly used in traditional medicine. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Tephrosia holstii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia holstii are typically made from its leaves and roots, which can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder for medicinal purposes.
